category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.forgottenZoo
category.item: Hidden Zoo
Congratulations! With the 3rd expansion, the kingdom of the Hidden Zoo is now at your feet! The arrow in the parking lot will direct you to the Hidden Zoo.
For a limited time now, you can expand your Secret Zoo to its maximum size with a single purchase! Go to your Secret Zoo, open the store, and click on "Add-ons." You'll find the offer here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.itemreward
category.item: Recycling was successful!
Great, that was worth it! You recycled these materials from the trash. You'll find them in your inventory.
Surprise box
Hooray! Your surprise box has been filled with the above materials, which you can use for further processing. You can find them in your inventory.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.breedingLabNursery
category.item: Raise new animal species! The breeding station and animal nursery are now available! Click on the blue elephant: You can find the buildings in the control center.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easterNotification
category.item: Easter shopping

The purchased item has been saved to your inventory.

Do you want to open your inventory now?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easterComic
category.item: Welcome to the Easter event! From April 21st to 27th, the Easter Bunny will be giving out eggs. Collect them, great rewards await you. Click on the arrow to learn more.
Great Easter decorations will earn you 50% more BZ for all events in the enclosures for 7 days. Take pictures of your Easter zoo and share them with your friends on Facebook or in the forum!
Let's go look for Easter eggs!
The cute Easter bouncers will attract a lot of customers. And the best part? They will stay in your zoo even after Easter - as befits a proper attraction!
The Easter enclosure is always an attraction, no matter what animals live in it. Easter enclosures will bring you 20% more BZ right from the start!

The Easter Bunny gives out eggs regularly. But once there are more than 5 eggs in your zoo, the egg-laying will be over. Tip: If you want to make sure you collect all the eggs every time, ask your Easter helper, Sonia, for advice!
One bunny isn't enough for you? Then there are more Easter bunnies waiting for you in the accessories section of the store. Just take a look!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2012Notification
category.item: Easter shopping

The purchased item has been saved to your inventory.

Do you want to open your inventory now?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2012Comic
category.item: Celebrate Easter at your zoo! The Easter Egg Hunt will take place from April 5th to 11th! Join this Easter extravaganza and win great prizes and surprises! Here's how:

Take care of your animals and find all the colorful eggs in your enclosures. Collect and return the eggs to the Easter game board.

Note: the number of eggs in your fields doubles each round!
Drop the Easter eggs on the corresponding game field. We have red, green and blue fields. Fantastic Easter rewards and cute animals are waiting for you!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.fullScreen
category.item: Do you want to exit full screen preview so you can type again?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.eventUpgrade
category.item: Give your enclosures an even more distinctive birthday look and you'll get 125% BZ and a higher chance of balloons during the birthday event!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.toolbar
category.item: Bonus
Great! You got a toolbar bonus for logging in:
Log in again tomorrow using the toolbar and get another bonus!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.itemInInventory
category.item: Congratulations!
You have purchased the following item for your inventory:

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.animalInInventory
category.item: The following animal has been added to your inventory:

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.itemRedeemed
category.item: Congratulations!
Your reward has been credited.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.action.sorry
category.item: We apologize!
We're sorry, but this event is currently unavailable.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.purchaseConfirmed
category.item: Congratulations!
The purchase was credited.
Your purchase has been credited and your gifts have been shipped.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.welcomeBack
category.item: Welcome back!
The animals are overjoyed to see you again.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.breedInInventory
category.item: Attention!

Breeding is currently underway here.

If you move the enclosure to the inventory, the breeding process will be canceled.

Do you really want to continue?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.collectables
category.item: Congratulations!
Yay! You found all the parts of the %collection% for the first time!
Show friends
Congratulations!
You have completed the %collection% for the second time!
Use
View collection

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.adamPenguin
category.item: Top package "Black Panther"
Now and here and only once available. "Black Panther" is here exclusively for you. And something extra like all helpers for 24 hours free!
"White Tiger" package
One-time offer - "combo package" for a great start! Your gear for the start for a great offer!
"Terrarium" package
One-time offer - "combo package" for a great start! Your gear for the start for a great offer!
"Prairie" package
One-time offer - "combo package" for a great start! Your gear for the start for a great offer!
Loyalty bonus
Only available here: a Zoodollars package with your personal loyalty bonus! Click "buy" and get more bonuses.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.payment
category.item: Zoodollars plus %percent%%!
Now your wish will come true!
Get extra zoodollars today!
Buy, for example, 100 zoodollars and get a total of %extradollar% zoodollars!
Applies to all payment methods except transfer.
Don't hesitate! The offer is still running:

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.conversionPack
category.item: Exclusively - only %priceCurrency%!
Save %savings%%!
And much more...
Don't hesitate and save %savings%%!

• 1 pair of female dogs
  • 1x savannah enclosure
  • 1 swan pond
  • 15x superfood
  • 15x best food
  • 10x supermedicine
  • 75 zoodollars

• 1 pair of lynxes
  • all 6 assistants for 24 hours
  • 1 rock enclosure
  • 1 dodo bird statue
  • 25x superfood
  • 25x best food
  • 25x supermedicine
  • 150 zoodollars

• 1 pair of white tigers
  • all 6 assistants for 24 hours
  • 1 tundra enclosure
  • 1 bear statue of liberty
  • 40x superfood
  • 35x best food
  • 30x supermedicine
  • 200 zoodollars

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.paymentBug
category.item: Dear players

Due to an error, you were credited with too many items in your pack. Unfortunately, we have to remove these items as it would not be fair to players who purchased the same pack. We have credited you with 500 paws as compensation for this misunderstanding.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.eventPack
category.item: Get a unique Christmas basket!
Want to make your Christmas event go faster? Get a small Christmas basket that can only be purchased once!

• 10x Candied Apples
  • 3x Tolia Essence
  • 3x Growth Potion
  • 5x Superfood
  • 5x Best Food
  • 25 Zoodollars
Want to make your Christmas event go faster? Get a large Christmas basket that can only be purchased once!

• 60x candied apples
  • all 7 helpers for 24 hours
  • 20x tolija essence
  • 20x growth potion
  • 20x superfood
  • 20x best food
  • 50 zoodollars

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.cinema
category.item: Unfortunately, you no longer have any movie tickets.
Yay! Here's your reward for watching the movie:
The credit will be applied within the next hour.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2012
category.item: You don't have enough Easter eggs.
Yay! You have earned the following reward:
Good luck finding eggs!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.avatar
category.item: Your avatar has been successfully saved.
Are you sure you want to close this window? Your avatar has not been saved yet!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.saveAssets
category.item: Do you want your game to load faster? ZooMumba is very graphics intensive. If you would like, we can save the images directly to your hard drive. This way the game will load much faster!
To enable these changes, simply click "Allow" the next time the window pops up. Otherwise, game data will continue to be stored in your browser's cache.
If you decide otherwise, simply open ZooMumba's settings and turn caching on or off.
Yes, save to hard drive (recommended)
No, continue to use browser cache

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.doublexp
category.item: Level up faster! Get double the amount of BZ for activities in the paddocks!
Grab extra experience points! These animals will give you a double dose of BZ:

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.specialShopItem
category.item: Super offer: Only for a short time!
Today is a special day for special animals: We're celebrating their birthdays! Available in the store for a short time only:

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.frog2012
category.item: Unfortunately, you are missing bonus items. Don't give up!
Hit! You've won a great reward:
Find even more items! Good luck!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.frog2012Notification
category.item: Buying collectible items
The purchased item is now in your zoo warehouse. Do you want to open a warehouse?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.frog2012Comic
category.item: From May 17th to 23rd, your zoo will be a fairy tale. Lots of fun and great prizes await you during the Royal Frog Event! </br></br>In the following steps, we'll show you how:
Take good care of your animals and collect special bonus items: a crowned frog, fins or a crown. Then exchange them in the frog game board for great prizes.
You can play as many rounds as you want. You'll need more and more items, but the prizes will be more and more fabulous! Soon the Frog King will be croaking in your zoo too!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.australien2012Comic
category.item: Sun, surf and marsupials - from June 25th to July 3rd you can have fun in your zoo Australian style! Don't miss out and win great Australian prizes! </br></br>In the following steps we'll show you how:
Take good care of your animals and collect special bonus items: a surfboard, red rock or sunscreen. Then exchange them for great surprises on the Australian playing field.
You can play as many rounds as you want. The more items you collect, the more magical your winnings will be! Turn your zoo into a little Australia!

Sun, surf and marsupials - from June 25th to July 3rd you can have fun in your zoo Australian style! Don't miss out and win great Australian prizes! </br></br>In the following steps we'll show you how:
Take good care of your animals and collect special bonus items: a surfboard, red rock or sunscreen. Then exchange them for great surprises on the Australian playing field.
You can play as many rounds as you want. The more items you collect, the more magical your winnings will be! Turn your zoo into a little Australia!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.indien2012Comic
category.item: Hello, hello! Do you want to have some fun from July 19th to 26th? Let me tell you something about this event:
As you care for your animals, watch out for special items that pop up: henna tattoos, cricket bats, and the Taj Mahal. Collect them and exchange them for cool rewards at the zoo!
Play as many rounds as you want. The more items you collect, the better the rewards. India is here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.anniversary2012Comic
category.item: Happy Birthday! Celebrate ZooMumba's second anniversary with us!
Collect as many horns, party hats and champagne flutes as you can for our party games. You could win a party cage with lots of party goodies!
What would a party be without balloons? Take care of your animals, collect balloons and exchange them on the playing field for crazy party surprises.

You can repeat the individual game rounds as many times as you want. You will need more and more items that will pop up when harvesting, but the rewards will be better and better. Hip, hip, hooray! Glory to all zoo directors!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.oktoberfest2012Comic
category.item: Let the party begin! Oktoberfest is here - come and celebrate in Bavarian style!
From October 1st to 7th, you can collect beer pong, soft pretzels, and traditional hats, as well as fantastic rewards like a new home: Oktoberfest - an amusement park!
You can play as often as you like. You'll need a supply of pop-up items, but you'll get traditional Bavarian rewards in exchange. So don't hesitate, you'll have a lot of fun!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.circusHelpcomic
category.item: There are lots of crates of exotic animals in the circus. After the first 5 hours, an animal will jump out of the crate at you! What kind of animal will it be?

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.christmas2012Layer
category.item: Deliver the chicks. Every light on means more great prizes!
Deliver the candied apples. Every light on means more great prizes!
Sell ​​your animals for zoogrosh and light up the Christmas tree!
Good job! Everything is lit up and you've collected all the rewards!
Congratulations! Together we lit up the entire Christmas tree and collected great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.christmas2012Comic
category.item: Merry Christmas! Please help me turn on the Christmas lights. For every light bulb you turn on, you can win various holiday prizes, such as an Arctic fox!
To turn on the lights, you must add candy apples or baby animals from your inventory.
Some lights can only be turned on with candy apples. The apples will pop out of the animal houses. You can buy more apples to progress faster.
Select a baby from your inventory and deliver it. Tip: The higher the animal's breeding level, the faster you can turn on the lights!
This is where all zoo directors have to work together: Sell the animals from your inventory for zoogros. Together you will light up the tree step by step and win great Christmas prizes.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentines2013Comic
category.item: Welcome to the Valentine's Day event! From February 14th to 25th, get ready for some serious romance! Play our Valentine's Day game and win great prizes!
Take care of your animals, collect cupcakes, heart balloons and greeting cards. Go through the playing field step by step and get rewards along the way. The main prize will be storks for your zoo!
Play as many rounds as you want. You'll need more pop-up items, but it'll increase your chances of getting more rewards!
Don't forget: all zoo directors play together. Sell animals from your inventory for zoogross. Work your way to the top of the plush mountain, where margay cats await as your reward!
Congratulations! You've reached the heights of the plush pile and won rewards along the way.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easterEvent2013Comic
category.item: Welcome to the Easter Zoo Event! From March 27th to April 8th, your zoo will transform into a colorful rainbow! Collect colorful chicks in our Easter game and exchange them for great prizes!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful chicks as you work! Go step by step across the playing field and collect all the rewards along the way. The main prize will be an emu!
Play as many rounds as you want. Get great prizes in every round.
Don't forget: all zoo directors play together. Sell animals from your inventory for zoogross. Reach the top of the plush pile and if you do, you'll win a sweet pair of anteaters!
Sell ​​the animals in your inventory and climb the plush mountain together.
Congratulations! You've reached the heights of the plush pile and won rewards along the way.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.frenchEvent2013Comic
category.item: Welcome to the French Zoo Event! We're going on a trip to France from July 11th to 16th! Collect items for our French game and exchange them for fantastic rewards!
Take care of your animals and collect the popping objects. Go through the game field step by step and get rewards along the way. The main prize is mouflons!
Play as many rounds as you want. You'll find fun prizes in each round.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.birthdayEvent2013Comic
category.item: Hooray! To celebrate our 3rd birthday, we've prepared a shooting festival: shoot balloons from August 15th to 28th and watch the rewards rain down on you! You'll get free darts every day.
Insert balloons into the board game. Each balloon inserted gets you closer to the prize. Win sensational birthday decorations and new animals.
Play as many rounds as you want. Tip: Log in every day and get even more darts with the daily login bonus!
You still need balloons for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
This way to the shooting festival! Pop the balloons and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.hungaryEvent2013Comic
category.item: Welcome to the Hungarian event at the zoo! Come with us on a trip to Hungary from September 12th to 24th! Collect peppers for our Hungarian game and exchange them for fantastic prizes!
Take care of your animals and collect peppers. Go step by step through the game field and get rewards. The main prize is new animals!
Play as many rounds as you want. A little warning: Peppers will be popping up until 12pm on September 23rd. However, you can trade them until September 24th.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2013Comic
category.item: Oh yeah! Those naughty penguins were playing with magic runes and managed to escape! There's Flubber, Larry and Swabby! Use the plasma blob and quickly catch them before they get into some mischief!
Help the good Boo catch the ghosts. Deliver them to the playing field and win terrifying prizes!
Every day you log in to the game, Boo will give you plasma blobs to hunt ghosts. Tip: Take care of your animals and plasma blobs will pop out of their homes. Good luck!
You still need ghosts for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your ghosts here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.thanksGiving2013Comic
category.item: Welcome to the zoo's Thanksgiving celebration! This time we're going to celebrate in the USA! Collect colorful leaves and exchange them for great rewards.
Take care of your animals and collect colorful leaves. Go step by step through the game field and get rewards along the way. The main prize is new animals for your zoo!
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the leaves will fall until the end of the event, but you can still exchange them for 24 hours afterwards.
You still need leaves (number: %count%) for this step. Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your letters here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.xmas2013Comic
category.item: Hohoho! Christmas is coming to the zoo! From December 19th to January 7th, you can collect Christmas ornaments in your zoo and exchange them for colorful plates for winter animals and Christmas decorations.
Take care of your animals and colorful decorations will pop out of their homes. Step by step, move around the playing field and exchange the decorations for holiday rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that decorations will pop up until 12 noon on January 6th, but you can exchange them until 12 noon on January 7th.
You still need decorations for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your decorations here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.egypt2014Comic
category.item: Travel with us to the Orient: Discover ancient Egypt, collect valuable scarabs and trade them in an Egyptian board game.
Take care of your animals and collect colorful scarabs that will pop out of your enclosures. Progress through the game board and exchange ornaments for oriental rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that scarabs will pop up until the end of the event. However, you can still exchange them for 24 hours afterwards.
You still need scarabs for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Deliver your scarabs here and win great rewards!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2014Comic
category.item: Get all the hearts: Collect cards from February 21st to March 10th in our Valentine's Day board game!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful cards that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game board and exchange them for romantic prizes.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the cards will pop up until 12 noon on March 10th, but you can exchange them until 12 noon on March 11th.
You still need greeting cards for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your wishes here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2014CommunityComic
category.item: Don't forget: all zoo directors play together. Sell animals from your inventory for zoogros. Reach the top of the plush mountain - great prizes await at every level!
Congratulations, you did it! You've reached the top of the heart pile and won rewards along the way.
Trade your animals here and get sweet rewards!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2014Comic
category.item: From April 10th to 28th, 2014, your zoo will be in full bloom: Come and have fun at our fantastic Easter event! Lots of Easter surprises and brand new animals await you on the Easter board game!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful Easter eggs that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game field and exchange the eggs for super spring rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that Easter eggs will pop up until 12 noon on April 28th, but you can exchange them until 12 noon on April 29th.
You still need Easter eggs for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Deliver your Easter eggs here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.summer2014Comic
category.item: Football fever in your zoo from June 19th to July 1st! Travel with us to Brazil: Samba, football, Brazilian rhythm and brand new animals await you in our board game!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful cocktail fruits that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game board and exchange the cocktails for super summer rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the cocktail fruits will pop up until 12 noon on June 30th, but you can exchange them until 12 noon on July 1st.
For this step you still need cocktail fruit (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Exchange cocktail fruits for super rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.birthday2014Comic
category.item: Big birthday party from August 19th to September 2nd! Lots of fantastic surprises are waiting for you in our board game!
Insert balloons into the board game. Each balloon inserted gets you closer to the prize. Win sensational birthday decorations and new animals.
Play as many rounds as you want. Remember: You can only collect balloons from your enclosures until August 27th, 12:00 PM. After that, you have 24 hours to use them.
You still need balloons for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Insert balloons and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2014Comic
category.item: Celebrate Halloween with us from October 30th to November 10th! Lots of fantastic surprises await you in our board game!
Take care of your animals and collect the slimes that will pop out of your dwellings. Step by step across the playing field and exchange the slimes for spooky and awesome rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the slime flies will only pop up until 12 noon on November 10th. After that, you have 24 hours to use them up.
You still need Slime Gnats for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your slime molds here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.recyclingComic
category.item: It's incredible what people throw away! There are so many valuable raw materials in waste: Separate waste for reuse. Help the environment and yourself!
All collected waste ends up directly in the recycling facility. Choose the raw material you want to make from the waste.
Choose how many items you want to make from the selected materials. Make sure you have enough scrap and zoogros to make them.
In addition to normal resources, you will also need rare resources. Using a super filter will increase your chance of obtaining a rare resource from recycling.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.craftingComic
category.item: Hi, I'm Inga Neer. I'll help you craft new items using raw materials. But first, you need a blueprint. Building blueprints are available and can be found throughout the zoo: when leveling up, from puzzle pieces and awards, from collections, on safari, or on the wheel of fortune.
All building plans are stored in the workshop. Simply open the category to see what plans you already have.
A green check mark will show you if you have all the ingredients. If so, then you can start!
If you want your workers to hurry up, try the "Craftsman Booster". Throw it in there and now they'll work twice as fast! Using Zoo Dollars, you can finish production in no time.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.recylingcraftingunlock
category.item: Recycle the waste in your zoo and build something new! The recycling facility and workshop are now available. Click on the blue elephant: You can find the buildings in the control center.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.toolchange
category.item: Building the recycling facility and workshop required a lot of tools, which you collected as well. To make sure you don't fall short, we'll give you experience points for the tools you collect.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.xmas2014Comic
category.item: Merry Christmas! From December 11th to 29th, penguins will decorate the Christmas fireplace. The more items you collect at the zoo, the prettier it will be. Play the board game and win a holiday surprise!
Take care of your animals and collect Christmas treats that will pop out of their enclosures. Go step by step around the playing field and exchange them for holiday rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the Christmas goodies will only pop up until 12 noon on December 29th. After that, you have 24 hours to use them up.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.boardgame
category.item: To complete this step, you still need to insert %count%x %collectitem%. Hurry up and get your reward!
Here you can exchange promotional items for great rewards!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2015Comic
category.item: Are you still looking for the man or woman of your dreams? Then play the Valentine's Day board game from February 12th to 23rd, 2015!
Take care of your animals and collect water lilies that will pop out of their enclosures. Go step by step around the playing field and exchange them for holiday rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the water lilies will only pop up until 12 noon on February 23rd. After that, you have 24 hours to use them up.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2015Board
category.item: Valentine's Day

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2014CommunityBoard
category.item: Plush Mountain

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2015Comic
category.item: Something strange is happening in the chicken coop. The Easter Bunny is late and needs help! Sneak into the chicken coop and collect the eggs! The Easter Bunny will be grateful!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful Easter bunnies that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game board and exchange them for cheerful rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that Easter bunnies will pop out of your enclosures until the end of the event. However, you can still use them for 24 hours afterwards to win rewards.
You still need Easter bunnies for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Deliver your Easter bunnies here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.asia2015Board
category.item: Journey to Asia

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.asia2015Comic
category.item: Travel with us to Asia for the Dragon Dance! Collect colorful lanterns to brighten up your celebration. May the water dragon bless you!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful lanterns that pop out of your enclosures. Progress through the game board and exchange the lanterns for exotic rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that the lanterns will pop up until the end of the event. However, you can still exchange them for 24 hours afterwards.
You still need lanterns for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Submit your lanterns here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.australian2015Board
category.item: Trip to Australia
Trip to Australia

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.australian2015Comic
category.item: Zoomumba is 5 years old! Hip, hip, hooray! Join us in the Australian outback and win amazing prizes: Shoot balloons and sneak through the Australian wilderness like Crocodile Dundee. Hooray!
Take care of your animals and collect arrows that will pop out of your enclosures. Use them to shoot down balloons. Go step by step through the game field and exchange balloons for rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that darts will pop out of your pens until the end of the event. However, you can still shoot balloons for 24 hours afterwards.
You still need balloons for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Insert balloons and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2015Board
category.item: Halloween
Halloween

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2015Comic
category.item: Abracadabra! Oh no! Which evil wizard turned little Perry into a giant pumpkin? Try to find the antidote and help Perry. From October 29th to November 9th, you will be able to try all the magic potions!
Take care of your animals and collect potions that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game board and exchange the potions for rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that potions will pop up until the end of the event. However, you can still exchange them for 24 hours afterwards.
You still need magic potions for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Deliver your potions here and win great rewards!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.winter2015Comic
category.item: Merry Christmas! The penguins want to decorate their fireplace for Christmas Eve. The more Christmas candles you collect, the cozier they will feel. You can win a winter surprise in the board game!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful Christmas candles that will pop out of the enclosures. Go step by step through the playing field and exchange them for fantastic rewards.
Complete as many laps as you want. Keep in mind that the Christmas candles will pop out of the enclosures until the end of the event, but you can still exchange them for 24 hours afterwards.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2016Comic
category.item: Hello to all lovers! Love is spreading around, so we have prepared a special event for you with lots of beautiful rewards. We also have a new pet - a striped mongoose, new romantic-themed decorations and two new shops!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful teddy bears that will jump out of the enclosures. Return them, gradually follow the path of love on the board game and collect rewards.
When you reach the end of the path, the board resets and you can play another round. The bears will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you have 24 hours to use them!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.easter2016Comic
category.item: Something strange is happening in the chicken coop. The Easter Bunny is late and needs help! Sneak into the chicken coop and collect the eggs! The Easter Bunny will be grateful!
Take care of your animals and collect colorful Easter bunnies that will pop out of your enclosures. Go step by step through the game board and exchange them for cheerful rewards.
Play as many rounds as you want. Keep in mind that Easter bunnies will pop out of your enclosures until the end of the event. However, you can still use them for 24 hours afterwards to win rewards.
You still need Easter bunnies for this step (number: %count%). Hurry up and get your reward!
Deliver your Easter bunnies here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.OceanComic
category.item: Hi, I'm Janička and I train marine mammals. Together we will build the best aquatic zoo ever!
Sonya and the penguins found an old water park behind a hidden zoo. There's not much left of it, but the water looks amazing. Let's renovate it!
We'll need to build everything! The penguins found some plans and materials in an old shack on the beach. Let's start by building the first aquatic habitat and pier.
Aquatic habitats are available in three sizes to make all aquatic animals feel at home. You can get the animals at the seafari or buy them at the beach hut!
Get help from the entire underwater team! Jindra will deliver the food and Matěj will bring the water. Franta will clean the filters and I will play with the animals.
Keep the water in the tanks clean and collect more pearls! Pearls can beautify the habitats even more.

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.oceanWorld2016Board
category.item: Birthday

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.oceanWorld2016Comic
category.item: Hello! The underwater world is in full swing, so we have prepared a special diving event for you! Seahorses, a brand new Tiki Bay enclosure, new shops and decorations await you!
Take care of your animals as usual and collect colorful starfish that pop out of your enclosures. Explore the underwater zones on the game board and earn rewards!
Once you've explored all the zones, the board will reset and you can dive again! Starfish will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you'll have 24 hours to use them.
You still need stars (number: %count% ) for this step!
Exchange your stars for awesome rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.monkey2016Comic
category.item: The monkeys are up to something... Help them with their mischief in our new board game! Earn rewards, including new shops and decorations for your zoo!
Take care of your animals as usual and collect the colorful vegetables that pop out of your enclosures. Give each meerkat a treat and earn rewards.
Once you've caused mischief to each meerkat, the board will reset and you can start over! The vegetables will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you'll have 24 hours to use them.
You still need vegetables for this step (number: %count% )!
Exchange your vegetables for great rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2016Board
category.item: Hocus pocus

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.halloween2016Comic
category.item: What are these mysterious potions doing here? Find out what they're for and earn rewards including exclusive Halloween items for your zoo!
Take care of your animals as usual and collect the colorful bottles that pop out of your enclosures. Open them on the game board and get rewards.
Once you've opened all the bottles, the board will reset and you can start over! Bottles will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you'll have 24 hours to use them.
You still need bottles (number: %count% ) for this step!
Exchange bottles for great rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.winter2016Comic
category.item: Christmas is here! Snow is falling at the zoo and the animals are writing a letter to Santa. Merry Christmas! The penguins are decorating the fireplace and need help! Earn holiday items by playing the board game!
Take care of your animals as usual and collect the gingerbread men that will pop out of your enclosures. Travel around the game board and collect prizes.
Once you finish the game, the board will reset and you can start over! You can collect gingerbread men until the end of the event. After that, you will have 24 hours to use them.
For this step you still need gingerbread men (number: %count% )!
Exchange your gingerbread men for awesome rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2017Comic
category.item: Hello! Are you looking for love? Play our Valentine's Day board game and get lots of items for the Undersea World. Maybe you'll find your true love along the path of love.
Take care of your animals as usual and collect the colorful shells that will pop out of your enclosures. Travel around the game board and collect prizes.
Once you finish the game, the board will reset and you can start over! The shells will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you will have 24 hours to use them.
You still need shells for this step (number: %count% )!
Exchange shells for awesome rewards here!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.valentine2017Board
category.item: Valentine's Day

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.cambodia2017Comic
category.item: Travel with us to Cambodia and venture into the depths of the tropical forests. Collect khon masks and discover the secrets of ancient Khmer temples. Riches and adventure await you!
Take care of your animals as usual and collect khon masks that will pop out of your enclosures. Travel around the game board and collect prizes.
Once you finish the game, the board will reset and you can start over! Khon masks will pop up until the end of the event. After that, you will have 24 hours to use them.
For this step you still need khon masks (number: %count% )!
Submit your khon masks here and win great prizes!

category.name: zoo.window.infoLayers.cambodia2017Board
category.item: Trip to Cambodia
